name: Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the salt, baking powder, rolled oats, chopped pecans, milk, and lemon extract, blending well.
3. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 8 minutes.
5. Cool for 2 to 3 minutes before removing from the baking sheet.
6. If the cookies become hard before removal from the sheet, reheat them in the oven for a few minutes to soften.
7. The cookies will be very thin and lacy. If desired, roll warm cookies one by one to form a cornucopia shape, pinching the points slightly.
